creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Dmitry,

Thanks for your patch.

I am currently working on the update of simgear to version 2.12, so I
won't update 2.10 anymore.

Regarding clang support, I don't know if this patch will be necessary
for 2.12. I'll use it if necessary :)

Thanks for your help,
Best regards,

--
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
http://www.martymac.org | http://contribs.martymac.org
